common.tagline: Every pixel stays on your device

hero.subtitle: AI background removal, smart compression, format conversion and precise cropping — all inside your browser. Your photos never leave your device.

remove-bg.name: Remove Background
remove-bg.desc: On-device AI cuts hair-level edges into clean transparent PNGs.

compress.name: Compress
compress.desc: Shrink JPG, PNG, WebP and AVIF dramatically with no visible loss.

convert.name: Convert
convert.desc: PNG, JPG, WebP and AVIF in any direction — iPhone HEIC included.

crop.name: Crop
crop.desc: Draw a rectangle, crop precisely with rotation support, keep the original format.

strip-exif.name: Strip EXIF
strip-exif.desc: Losslessly remove GPS and camera metadata. Zero quality loss.

studio.pasteHint: You can also paste from the clipboard (⌘V)
studio.supported: JPG · PNG · WebP · AVIF · HEIC · GIF · BMP
studio.processingHint: Hang tight — please keep this page open
studio.rejectedNote: {count} file(s) skipped (unsupported format or over 80 MB)
studio.errorUnsupportedLossless: Lossless stripping supports JPG, PNG and WebP only
studio.errorEngine: This device can't run the AI engine

engine.loadingDesc: One-time download — cached forever, instant next time
engine.tierLiteHint: This browser's WebGPU can't run the 1024 model reliably, so we switched automatically — edge refinement still runs at full resolution
engine.unavailableTitle: This browser can't run the AI locally
engine.unavailableDesc: WebGPU not detected. Please use the latest Chrome, Edge or Safari.

remove-bg.title: Drop a photo, lose the background
remove-bg.desc: The BiRefNet AI model runs right inside your browser. Hair, fur and translucent edges separate cleanly into a ready-to-use transparent PNG.

compress.title: 80% smaller, visually identical
compress.desc: MozJPEG, OxiPNG, WebP and AVIF encoders compiled to WASM run locally. Drag one slider to trade size against quality in real time.
compress.b2: Batch dozens of images at once
compress.b3: Live preview of every byte saved

convert.title: HEIC to AVIF in one step
convert.desc: iPhone HEIC shots, ancient BMPs — convert them all to modern web-friendly formats with dimensions and colors intact.
convert.b3: Adjustable quality — convert and compress in one go

crop.title: Crop exactly what you frame
crop.desc: Freeform marquee or aspect-ratio presets, with rotate and flip. The original format is preserved — PNG in, PNG out.

strip-exif.title: Share the photo, not your location
strip-exif.desc: GPS coordinates, timestamps, device model — wipe every bit of metadata in one click, leaving only the picture itself.

privacy.title: Your photos never leave your device
privacy.desc: No uploads, no servers, no accounts. Every computation happens in your own browser — that's not a promise, it's the architecture.
privacy.s1l: uploads — images never touch a server
privacy.s3l: free forever, no watermarks, no limits

final.title: Drag an image in and see
final.sub: Free, no sign-up, no watermark. It just works.

footer.privacy: Your images never leave your device.

home.title: LumiPic — Free, private image tools in your browser
home.description: On-device AI background removal, image compression, format conversion and cropping. Free, no sign-up, and your photos never leave your browser.

remove-bg.title: Remove Image Background Online — free, private, AI | LumiPic
remove-bg.description: Studio-grade hair edges, one-click transparent PNGs. On-device AI, free and unlimited — no uploads.

compress.title: Compress Images Online — private & free | LumiPic
compress.description: Smart in-browser compression for JPG, PNG, WebP and AVIF. No uploads, no limits, no watermarks.

convert.title: Convert Image Formats — HEIC to JPG, PNG to WebP | LumiPic
convert.description: Convert between PNG, JPG, WebP and AVIF, including iPhone HEIC. Free, private, fully in-browser.

crop.title: Crop Images Online — free & private | LumiPic
crop.description: Crop images with aspect presets and rotation, saved in the original format. Free, private, fully in-browser.

strip-exif.title: Remove EXIF & GPS Data from Photos — lossless | LumiPic
strip-exif.description: Losslessly strip location and camera metadata before sharing. Free, private, in your browser.
